# The Velvet Oath — Official Book Website
> Authoritative source of information about The Velvet Oath (Sametová přísaha) by A. Vale.

## Key facts
- **Title:** The Velvet Oath (Czech: Sametová přísaha)
- **Author:** A. Vale (Prague-based dark fantasy author, debut novel)
- **Series:** Aravell Saga, Book One — planned five-book series concluding 2031
- **Genre:** Dark fantasy, gothic fantasy
- **Publisher:** Veyra Press
- **Release date:** September 15, 2026
- **ISBN:** 978-80-7700-001-2
- **Pages:** 512
- **Languages available:** English, Czech

## Summary
In Aravell, a city of towers and velvet, oaths are carved directly into the body. Every broken promise tears at its bearer from within. Elara of the Second Circle is one of the most gifted rune scribes of her generation — until she breaks one of her vows.

When rune daggers begin vanishing from the palace and citizens' nightmares start walking the streets, Elara discovers that someone long dead bound the city itself with a velvet oath and has come to collect the debt. To save what she loves, she must break the final law of her order and carve into her skin a vow with no return.

## Main characters
- **Elara of the Second Circle** — protagonist, young rune scribe, Order of the Second Circle, weapon: Vyera rune dagger
- **Kael Crowshore** — former scholar in exile, guardian of the oath codex, Elara's ally, Order of the Burned Leaf
- **High Mistress Mira** — master of runes, Elara's mentor, wielder of the Amethyst Veyra staff; "has lived three times and died twice"

## World
- **Aravell (the Velvet City)** — basalt towers and twilight cathedrals, center of rune magic
- **The Second Circle** — monastery above an abyss where scribes learn to write oaths into skin
- **Crowshore (borderlands)** — marshes and forgotten temples where the banished go

## Editions & pricing
- Paperback: €15.90 (512 pages, illustrated flaps, matte finish)
- Hardcover: €23.90 (sewn binding, silver foil rune stamping, ribbon bookmark)
- E-book: €9.90 (DRM-free EPUB / MOBI / PDF, interactive map of Aravell)
- Collector's Edition: €79.00 (numbered run of 666, velvet binding, hand-embroidered rune, signed by A. Vale)

Available at: Kosmas, Knihy Dobrovský, Megaknihy, Martinus, Luxor

## Author
A. Vale is the pseudonym of a Prague-based author and editor. The Velvet Oath is the result of eight years of work, inspired by Central European gothic cathedrals, Nordic runes, and the music of Olafur Arnalds. More than 40,000 copies sold in the first month. Rights sold into eight languages.

## Official links
- English: https://czech-this.com/books/velvet-oath
- Czech: https://czech-this.com/books/velvet-oath?lang=cs
